title: Thoughts and things 10/6/2025 — manifesting in Austin and Emily-reevaluation
html:
Thoughts and things 10/6/2025 — manifesting in Austin and Emily-reevaluation

Source: 2025-10-06 Google Doc, ~3 weeks into Austin. Yahir clocks two early-Austin manifestations coming true (one friend, one client) and immediately pivots to the harder question — Emily is "rightfully wanting to reevaluate our relationship, what the fuck are we."

TL;DR

  • Day-shape — "Another day in austin. I didnt leave my apartment till 4pm today."
  • Manifestation receipts — "I said I wanted to make one friend in Austin, i semi made one with Joey and Amy. I said I wanted to get one client. On the first day of cold calling I got the perfect person." The October friend-goal from the Stranger in a BIG scary new wrld doc partially landing.
  • The Emily core — "I think of emily and i feel wanted. I feel like this is someone who accepts me and i dont even have to put on a face. She wants me to love her, and i want to love her. If she moved to Austin id tell her to move in with me."
  • The hesitation — "My hesitation is that we are separate in distance and I want to feel love but i also dont want to restruct myself for what could be here."
  • Proximity-is-power — "The truth is proximity is power, I feel like its getting to be a lot. I dont want to end things, but this setup is not helping either of us." The thesis-line that becomes the LDR pattern concept's 2025 articulation.

Pattern observed

This sits between Stranger in a BIG scary new wrld (10/4) and Exactly what I want — Emily (10/28) in the early-Austin Emily arc. The 10/4 doc set "make one friend" as the October goal; 10/6 reports semi-making one (Joey and Amy); by late October, Emily is the dominant relational subject. The arc's tension — proximity-is-power vs. "if she moved to Austin id tell her to move in with me" — is the same setup that the March 2026 alignment audit resolves negatively.

Notably, this is the first cataloged Austin doc where Yahir uses "Tinder/hinge and starting rizzing girls" as the counter-factual he's choosing not to pursue — guilt-as-fidelity-mechanism inside an undefined long-distance arrangement.

The closing line — "Lets talk deeply to your boys about this that may understand…" — is the same outsourced-relational-processing move the February 2026 doc also does (the council-of-bros pattern).

Privacy

  • Joey and Amy — first-name-only Austin acquaintances, queued to Potential Entities (single mention; 2nd mention triggers stub).
  • All Emily references stay first-name per existing Emily entity convention.

Open questions

  • Who are Joey and Amy? (The single-mention pattern matches a one-time event encounter.)
  • The cold-call client — is this the Rankett-era first client? Worth cross-referencing with the December business plan.
